# Luxury Hair Co.

> Raw Vietnamese human hair in 5×5 Closures and Full Frontals — 10" to 30". Natural, Burgundy, Brown, Colour 33, and Two-Tone colourways. Same-day Cape Town delivery. R6,500 to R19,600.

## About

Luxury Hair Co. is a South African e-commerce store selling raw Vietnamese human hair — a Signature Collection of 19 styles. Based in Cape Town, South Africa. All hair is 100% raw Vietnamese, straight texture, with no synthetic blends. The business serves Cape Town with same-day delivery and ships nationwide via courier.

## Product catalogue — Raw Vietnamese Hair Signature Collection

### 10 Inch (5×5 Closure)
| Style Name | Colourway | Part | Price |
|---|---|---|---|
| Black Desire | Natural | Middle Part | R6,500 |
| Velvet Kiss | Burgundy | 3 Part | R7,000 |
| Golden 33 | Colour 33 | 3 Part | R7,000 |

|---|---|---|---|

| Scarlet Obsession | Burgundy | Middle Part | R10,500 |

| Style Name | Colourway | Price |
|---|---|---|
| Black Diamond Straight | Natural | R19,000 |
| Midnight Mocha | Two-Tone | R19,600 |
| Wine Velvet | Burgundy | R19,600 |

## Colourways explained
- **Natural** — jet-black, unprocessed Vietnamese hair
- **Burgundy** — deep wine/ruby red
- **Colour 33** — auburn/chestnut
- **Brown** — warm chocolate/mocha brown
- **Two Tone** — ombré from dark root to lighter ends

## Types explained
- **5×5 Closure** — 5×5 lace closure wig/piece; available in Middle Part or 3 Part
- **Full Frontal** — 13×4 or 13×6 lace frontal for a natural hairline edge

## Ordering

Customers order through the website or directly on WhatsApp. The checkout collects delivery details and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message for the team to confirm.

## Payment methods
- PayFast (card, EFT, instant EFT)
- Yoco (card, tap-to-pay)
- EFT / Direct bank transfer
- Confirmation via WhatsApp

## Delivery
- Cape Town: same-day for orders placed before 1 PM
- Nationwide South Africa: 2–3 business days via courier

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +27 82 555 1234

- Website: https://luxuryhairco.github.io
